goal: Build a single-cube precision drop benchmark: 1 cube on conveyor, 1 small target zone (10x10cm marker), robot picks and drops at exact target. Minimal scene for measuring cuRobo drop precision (run multiple times → distribution of cube_final - target).
thoughts:
Six precision-benchmark specifics for CP-28 (extends CP-13 — single cube, smaller target):
1) 1 cube on conveyor at x=-1.4 — same starting position as CP-01.
2) Target zone = a flat 10×10×0.05m marker at [0, -0.4, 0.775]. Top z=0.80.
3) Drop target [0, -0.4, 0.825] — exact center xy. Each run measures (cube_final - drop_target).
4) For statistical drop-precision measurement, run this canonical N times (e.g. via function_gate_consistency) and analyze distribution.
5) Minimal scene avoids confounders (cube-cube collision, multi-cube scheduling). Pure controller precision test.
6) Industrial use: precision benchmark for QA / acceptance testing of new controllers / new robots / new physics tunings.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# 1 cube
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[-1.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/Cube_1"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", material_name="rubber")

# Small target zone marker (10x10x0.05cm)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/TargetZone", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, -0.4, 0.775], scale=[0.05, 0.05, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/TargetZone", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# Single drop_target — exact center of TargetZone top
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    destination_path="/World/TargetZone",
    drop_target=[0.0, -0.4, 0.825],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/TargetZone"],
)
extension_notes: CP-28 is the precision-benchmark canonical. Run N times, measure (cube_final - drop_target) distribution for empirical drop-precision characterization. Useful for: acceptance testing new controllers, comparing target_source modes (curobo vs spline vs sensor_gated), tuning physics params, validating robot calibration after maintenance.
failure_modes: Single-cube → no precision drift across iterations. Each run is independent.
Target zone tiny (10x10cm) → many runs will land outside (cuRobo precision ~5cm). Acceptable — characterizing the distribution IS the point.
verified_status: build-verified-2026-05-08; form-gate ✓; PRECISION DATA (3-run benchmark): cube_final drift from target = (run1: 0.21m, run2: 0.20m, run3: 0.33m). Mean ~24cm. y-axis drift dominates (~0.20-0.28m); x-axis smaller (~0.08-0.16m). All runs cube ended at z=0.525 (table top) — fell off the 10cm TargetZone. Implies cuRobo drop precision is closer to 20-30cm than the assumed 5cm. CP-08 (30cm pallet) succeeds because of generous margin, not precision.
code_template:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

# 1 cube
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, material_name="rubber")

# Small target zone marker (10x10x0.05cm)
create_prim(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{primary_destination.position}}, scale={{primary_destination.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

# Single drop_target — exact center of TargetZone top
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}],
    destination_path={{primary_destination.path}},
    drop_target={{primary_destination.drop_target}},
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{primary_destination.path}}],
)
